reviews.comment:
Habia combustible pero nos dijeron que tienen problemas con las bombas de expender. Recien la tercera vez que fuimos pudimos cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
There was fuel available, but they told us they were having problems with the pumps. We were only able to refuel on our third visit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQdEp2UXB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Está ubicado en un lugar privilegiado, una vista increíble y muy atento el personal. No me hospedé porque no lo conocía, la próxima me hospedo SIN DUDARLO.

(Translated by Google)
It's in a prime location, with an incredible view, and the staff is very attentive. I didn't stay there because I wasn't familiar with it, but next time I'll definitely stay there.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpia y ordenada el lugar lastima que cuando pasamos no había nafta tienen que preveer eso dado que mucha gente recorre la ruta 40 y no hay estación de servicio cerca

(Translated by Google)
The place was very clean and tidy, it's a shame that when we passed by there was no gas. They need to anticipate that, given that many people travel Route 40 and there is no gas station nearby.
